Data

DBPR-graded · 5,856 restaurants · Updated June 2026

Central Florida Restaurant Health Scores & Dietary Guide

Find where to eat across Central Florida with confidence. This directory pairs official Florida health inspection grades with dietary accommodations and diner ratings for 2066 restaurants — 1318 of them currently holding an A grade. Browse by county, city, or one of the region’s named dining districts.

  • A Top-rated & safeGrade-A guides
  • ✦ Featured picksHidden gems
  • C Browse by county8 counties
  • N NeighborhoodsDining districts
